project: UP Platform Phase 5: Provenance Plugin & Observability
description: Refactor provenance tracking into a plugin with hooks, add confidence-based quality scoring, and create a status dashboard skill for Claude Code.

userStories.title: Provenance hook: auto-record on task completion
userStories.description: Create a plugin hook that automatically records provenance entries after every AI operation, capturing model, files changed, verification results, and chain links.
acceptanceCriteria: Create .up/plugins/builtin/provenance/hooks/auto_record.py
Triggers on TASK_COMPLETE and TASK_FAILED events
Records: operation_id (content-addressed hash), parent_id (previous op), timestamp, task_title
Captures: ai_engine name, files_modified (list with line counts), verification_results (test/lint/type)
Chain integrity: each record includes hash of parent record (Merkle-style)
Uses existing ProvenanceManager from core/provenance.py
Unit tests verifying chain integrity across 3+ operations
userStories.notes: Refactors existing provenance logic into plugin hook format.

userStories.title: Provenance hook: capture AI prompt context
userStories.description: Extend provenance recording to capture prompt hash and context files used in each AI operation, without storing full prompt content.
acceptanceCriteria: Add PRE_EXECUTE hook that captures: prompt hash (SHA-256 of prompt text), context_files (list of file paths referenced)
Store prompt hash in provenance record, NOT the full prompt (privacy/size)
Context files detected by scanning prompt for file path patterns
POST_EXECUTE hook links the pre-execute context to the completion record
Provenance record now includes: prompt_hash, context_files, duration_seconds
Unit tests verifying prompt hash consistency
userStories.notes: Depends on US-001. Adds the 'what was the AI thinking' dimension to provenance.

userStories.title: Chain integrity verification command
userStories.description: Add 'up provenance verify' that walks the Merkle chain and reports any broken links or tampered records.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'verify' subcommand to src/up/commands/provenance.py
Walks chain from latest record back to genesis, verifying each parent hash
Reports: total operations, chain length, integrity status (pass/fail)
If broken: shows exactly which record has mismatched hash
Rich output: green checkmarks for valid links, red X for broken
Exit code 0 if chain valid, 1 if broken (for CI integration)
userStories.notes: Depends on US-001. Simple chain walk + hash verification.

userStories.title: Provenance export for compliance
userStories.description: Add 'up provenance export' that generates a JSON or CSV report of all AI operations for audit/compliance purposes.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'export' subcommand to src/up/commands/provenance.py
'up provenance export --format json' outputs structured JSON array
'up provenance export --format csv' outputs CSV with headers
Optional --since flag to filter by date range
Optional --output flag to write to file (default: stdout)
Includes all fields: operation_id, timestamp, task, files, verification, chain_hash
Unit tests verifying export format correctness
userStories.notes: Depends on US-001. Useful for enterprise compliance and team retrospectives.

userStories.title: Builtin provenance plugin manifest
userStories.description: Package provenance hooks as a builtin plugin with proper manifest and hooks.json.
acceptanceCriteria: Create .up/plugins/builtin/provenance/plugin.json
Create hooks/hooks.json registering auto_record and context capture hooks
auto_record: matches TASK_COMPLETE, TASK_FAILED
context_capture: matches PRE_EXECUTE, POST_EXECUTE
Update up init to include provenance plugin in builtin setup
Integration test: run task, verify provenance recorded with chain link
userStories.notes: Depends on US-001, US-002. Packaging step.

userStories.title: Enhanced status dashboard with plugin awareness
userStories.description: Upgrade 'up status' to show plugin status, hook activity, and provenance chain health alongside existing loop/circuit/memory info.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify src/up/commands/status.py to include plugin section
Plugin section shows: total installed, enabled count, recent hook executions (last 5)
Provenance section shows: chain length, last operation, integrity status
Memory section shows: total entries, last search, last record
All sections use Rich panels with consistent formatting
Sections gracefully degrade if subsystem unavailable (e.g., no ChromaDB)
userStories.notes: Depends on Phase 1 plugin registry. Enhances existing status command.
